introSection: Manta is a steel launched roller coaster located at SeaWorld Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. It opened with the park on 23 May 2023.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Manta is a steel launched roller coaster located at SeaWorld Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. It opened with the park on 23 May 2023.



5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.
